Task: Research college options - make a list of 6 to 8 schools
Notes_from_Eric: Start with schools in Illinois. Check Lakeview. Also look at UIC and U of I. A few out of state too for reach.

Task: Take PSAT (if still available) or full SAT
Notes_from_Eric: Check collegeboard.org for test dates. Register early - they fill up.

Task: Talk to school counselor about college process
Notes_from_Eric: They have a checklist and know your school's deadlines. Do not wait for them to find you.
Ask two teachers who actually know your work. Give them a note with your accomplishments. Give them time.
Go to studentaid.gov. You need your own FSA ID and Mom or Dad needs one too. Do this before October 1.
File as early as October 1. Do not wait. Mom and Dad will need 2025 tax info. I will help you walk through this.
Illinois gives grant money to in-state students with financial need. Filing FAFSA early is how you get it.
Ask counselor for a list. Cicero has community organizations that give money. Also check firstgenerationscholarships.org
commonapp.org - free to make, cheap to apply. Most schools use it.
Pick ONE specific story. Not a list of everything you have done. I will read drafts.
Each school has short extra essays. Take them seriously.
Non-binding. Almost always worth doing. Shows schools you care.
Deadline varies. Use your tracking spreadsheet.
Most schools send a login to a portal after you apply. Check it. Reply to any requests immediately.
Look at total cost after aid, not just sticker price. We will go through this together.

Task: Make final decision and send deposit
Notes_from_Eric: Deadline is May 1 every year. After that you lose your spot.
Be polite and do it quickly. Other students are waiting.
Most schools require it. Register as soon as the link opens.

Task: Apply for on-campus housing if desired
Notes_from_Eric: Fills up fast. Act immediately after depositing.

Task: Look into first-gen student resources at target schools
Notes_from_Eric: Ask admissions if they have a first-gen program. Lakeview has one. Most good schools do now.

Task: Talk to Eric whenever you have questions
Notes_from_Eric: I am serious. Text me. I will answer. This is what big brothers are for.
